message:
Add semantic tone system and reusable visual primitives for TUI

Introduce a SemanticTone enum (Neutral, Accent, Success, Warning,
Danger, Muted) that maps to both foreground and tinted background
colours, enabling consistent tone-driven styling across the UI.

Key additions:
- SemanticTone enum with semantic_fg/semantic_bg/chip_style/panel helpers
- Five new tinted BG_SURFACE_* background palette entries for tone chips
- semantic_panel_block(), push_chip(), push_metric_chip() composables
- build_header_text() rewritten to use chip-based layout with responsive
  narrow/wide breakpoints
- Reusable visual primitives: status_chip(), priority_badge(),
  type_badge(), metric_strip(), blocker_indicator(), section_separator(),
  panel_header(), label_chips(), and issue_scan_line()

These primitives consolidate duplicated styling logic and give every
surface a uniform visual language, making future panels and views
trivial to compose.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
